title: Smooth font(X32)
body:
> I have drawn the basics, and for now, it’s only in English (unfinished). ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6a1b89c48f03a2ae7b54d2a1ed1b33b9f322f6.png)

> > I will complete it later.!!

> > Looks really nice, doesn't it? :)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ccf76e72425ad7222bc5ad87b4f856fa81ebff.png)

> > This is the font under nametag, I think it looks really nice.<❤️> :p
